title: Venuscello 12 x Strong Disposable Cutlery Bagasse Knives Heavy Duty Bagasse Biodegradable White Eco-Friendly & Compostable
features: Eco-Friendly: Bagasse knives are biodegradable and compostable, making them an environmentally friendly alternative to traditional plastic utensils.
Sturdy and Durable: Despite being made from plant-based materials, bagasse knives are strong and durable, suitable for cutting various types of food.
Heat and Cold Resistant: Bagasse knives can withstand temperatures from -10°C to 100°C, making them suitable for use with hot or cold foods.
Safe and Non-Toxic: Bagasse knives are free from harmful chemicals and toxins, ensuring they are safe for food contact.
Compostable: After use, bagasse knives can be composted along with food waste, reducing landfill waste and returning nutrients to the soil.
description: Product Description Bagasse Products for Parties and Events - Ideal Tableware for Any Occasion Bagasse products are made from sugarcane fibers, offering a practical option for tableware and packaging. Previous page Next page 1 Heat-Resistant Design 2 Lightweight but Strong 3 Microwave & Freezer Safe Bagasse Tableware for Events : For parties and gatherings. Sugarcane fiber design. Convenient Serving Plates : Easy to handle, ideal for meal. Great for indoor & outdoor use. Versatile Tableware : Suitable for catering & events. Available different products. Smart Serving Choice : Practical and functional. Reliable for any occasion. Sturdy Material :- Crafted from high-quality sugarcane fibers, these products are strong enough to handle heavy or wet foods without breaking. Oil and Liquid Resistant :- Designed to prevent liquids and oils from soaking through, ensuring a clean and mess-free experience. Convenient Single-Use :- These products provide an easy solution for quick cleanups, designed for hassle-free disposal after use. Reliable and Convenient :- These products offer a practical and dependable choice for everyday dining, gatherings, or special events. What are bagasse products made from? Bagasse products are made from sugarcane fiber, a byproduct of sugar production. Are bagasse products durable? Yes, they are strong enough to handle both hot and cold foods without breaking. Are these products oil and liquid resistant? Yes, bagasse products resist oil and liquids, making them perfect for saucy or greasy foods. Can I use bagasse products for outdoor events? Yes, they are perfect for outdoor use like picnics, events and parties. Are bagasse products lightweight? Yes, they are lightweight yet strong, making them easy to handle.
